originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&__buf_978` is never used.

sanitizedDescription: The value written to `&buf` is never used.
model:
(define-fun CONFIG_FEATURE_CLEAN_UP () Bool
  false)
(define-fun _STDLIB_H () Bool
  false)
(define-fun __malloc_and_calloc_defined () Bool
  false)
reasoning: Pulse duplicate of TRANSFORMATION_57. When CONFIG_FEATURE_CLEAN_UP=F, buf is assigned from malloc(bufsize) at L26 but never read or freed (cleanup block absent). Genuine dead store and memory leak. New bug. PC = !CLEAN_UP AND !_STDLIB_H AND !__malloc_and_calloc_defined: restrictive library macros (!_STDLIB_H, !__malloc_and_calloc_defined) over-constrain — bug fires in all !CLEAN_UP configs, not just non-standard stdlib states.
